text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Tokyo Daishoten—the last and biggest dirt
race of the year. Oguri Cap and Super Creek have
come to watch Inari One's performance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One sets off to take her place at the top of
the regionals under the scrutinizing eyes of the
two racers who turned heads at the Arima Kinen.
